headline: Ibrahima Konate — update
body: BREAKING: Real Madrid have confirmed the transfer of Ibrahima Konate 🚨 The central defender will join Real Madrid at the end of the month when his Liverpool contract expires ⚽️ https://t.co/ZWRkEprzxB
text: Ibrahima Konate set to leave Liverpool when contract expires next month. The player and club unable to agree new terms.
